violations.text: The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by numerous live small flies in establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. DeBug pest control service weekly provided by Bryant University; last date of service 8/19/2025. Pest control service receipt stated the issue is originating next door. Pest control service is to be increased to 2X per week until issue is resolved. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a large garbage can. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC moved during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The door to the outside, located at the trash compactor, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
A leak was observed at the drain of the 3-bay sink at the juncture to the grease trap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
The condensate from the air handler unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
Trash debris and leaf litter were observed around the compactor area. Refuse areas must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine (inside near condenser) have minor accumulation mineral residue and hard water staining. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
